channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: Iran and U.S. trade strikes as deal to end war remains elusive
item.dc:creator: Steve Hendrix
item.description: U.S. Central Command said it targeted Iranian sites overlooking the strategic Strait of Hormuz, and Kuwait's military on Monday said it was responding to retaliatory airstrikes.

item.title: Hardening views on migrants push Europe toward Trump-like tactics
item.dc:creator: Anthony Faiola, Ellen Francis
item.description: New rules were driven by high numbers of asylum seekers from “safe countries” and the fatigue of voters after waves of migration, European officials say.

item.title: Ukraine turns real-life kills into video game thrills for drone pilots
item.dc:creator: David Stern
item.description: Kyiv says the Army of Drones Bonus system, in which points may be redeemed for weapons, is the first of its kind anywhere.
